resources.string: Your family OTP sharing companion. Intercept SMS OTPs and sync them with your family devices instantly.
Give this device a name so your family knows who is receiving the OTP.
FamilyCode automatically detects OTP SMS and syncs them to your Google Sheet.
All family members can see the last 15 OTPs received across all linked devices.
Uses Google Apps Script and Sheets to keep your data private and accessible.
FamilyCode requires a Google Apps Script backend to sync OTPs. Please follow the instructions to set it up.
Make sure your Apps Script is deployed as a Web App.
1. Create a new Google Sheet and copy its URL.
2. Paste the Sheet URL in the box below.
3. Click \"Copy Code\" to copy the Apps Script code.
4. In your Google Sheet, go to Extensions -> Apps Script.
5. Delete any existing code, paste the copied code, and Save (Ctrl+S).
6. Click \"Generate API Key\" below, copy it.
7. In Apps Script, go to Code.gs and update the SECRET_API_KEY variable.
8. Alternatively, set API_KEY in Project Settings -> Script Properties.
9. Click Deploy -> New Deployment -> Select Type: Web App.
10. Description: \"FamilyCode\", Execute as: Me, Who has access: Anyone -> Deploy.
11. Copy the \"Web App URL\" and paste it into the Script URL box below.
